headline: Oil Shock, Private Credit Cracks & Adobe's Bittersweet Beat
summary: Brent crude punched through $100 a barrel for the first time since 2022, Iran's new Supreme Leader vowed to keep the Strait of Hormuz closed, and a simmering private credit crisis finally boiled over onto bank stock prices — all in a single Thursday session. Welcome to the new normal.

headline: Mosaic’s Rare Earths Shift Adds New Layer To Fertilizer Story
summary: Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) has entered a joint venture with Rainbow Rare Earths to advance the Uberaba rare earths project in Brazil. The partnership includes plans for a new processing facility in Minas Gerais focused on neodymium, praseodymium and other rare earth elements. The project targets rare earths production by 2030, marking Mosaic's move into rare earth element processing alongside its fertilizer operations. For investors following Mosaic at a share price of $31.36, this rare earths...

headline: The Mosaic Company (MOS) Climbs 7.6% on Rare Earth Expansion
summary: The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) is one of the 10 Stock Winners in a Brutal Market. Mosaic grew for a second day on Thursday, jumping 7.58 percent to close at $31.36 apiece, as investors resumed buying positions amid its ongoing efforts to ramp up expansion into rare earths production. Through its subsidiary, Mosaic Fertilizantes P&K Limitada, […]
